name: chatgpt-exporter
description: Export all your ChatGPT conversations, projects & GPTs as JSON, Markdown and HTML

scripts.build: npx esbuild server.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=bundle.cjs && npx @yao-pkg/pkg bundle.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/chatgpt-exporter-win.exe && node -e "const{cpSync}=require('fs');cpSync('public','dist/public',{recursive:true})"
